title: viola × sardagnae
intro: Viola × sardagnae, also known as Sardinian pansy, is a hybrid plant species of the viola genus, native to the island of Sardinia in Italy. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating inflammation and wounds due to its antioxidant and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Viola × sardagnae include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and even exhibit anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or ingested in moderation under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
